docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. THE APPLICATION FOR COMPLEX DESIGNATION IS APPROVED. AN ORDER GRANTING COMPLEX DESIGNATION AND FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE ETHAN P. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (D304)
